title: Oil Lamp Purchase

title: Return to Work Bonus
description: What financial incentives are available for employers who hire individuals returning to the workforce, particularly those with disabilities or in disadvantaged circumstances?
narrative: The user is seeking information about government or organizational programs that provide financial bonuses to employers who hire individuals returning to work, especially those with disabilities or from marginalized backgrounds. Relevant documents should describe specific bonus schemes, such as the €4,000 recruitment bonus for hiring disabled employees in France, including eligibility criteria, duration, and application procedures. Documents discussing unrelated employment incentives, such as general unemployment insurance reforms or temporary job schemes not tied to re-entry into the workforce, are not relevant. The focus is on targeted return-to-work incentives that support reintegration into employment through employer financial support.
